name: Tendai M.
quote: Booked a Fortuner for two weeks driving up to Vic Falls. Picked up clean, returned without a hassle. WhatsApp support actually answered.

name: Rudo S.
quote: Quick weekend rate, paid on EcoCash, drove out to Great Zimbabwe with friends. Will book again.

name: Mark D.
quote: We use Wonder Travel for our NGO field trips. Reliable fleet, invoiced billing, and they sort the cross-border permits.
